title: crotalaria trinervia
intro: Crotalaria trinervia is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae, and is often known as the 'three-veined rattlebox' due to its seed pods. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria trinervia are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and its leaves and roots are used for medicinal purposes.
